nodes.title: Validate delegate inputs up front
nodes.why: Early guards make failures obvious and prevent odd runtime behavior later.
nodes.alternative: Skip checks and rely on downstream errors.
nodes.tradeoff: A few extra lines, but clearer and safer API behavior.

nodes.title: Use closest() to find the nearest matching ancestor
nodes.why: This lets clicks on nested children still resolve to the intended delegated element.
nodes.tradeoff: More robust matching across nested DOM, with a tiny ancestor-walk cost.

nodes.title: Call handler only if match stays inside root
nodes.why: The boundary check prevents accidental matches outside the delegated container.
nodes.tradeoff: Safer delegation scope, with one extra containment check per matched event.
